name: Poppyseed Dressing for Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together sugar, salt, mustard, poppy seeds, celery seeds, and grated onion.
2. Stir in vinegar.
3. With the electric beater running, add oil a little at a time until blended and thickened.
4. Refrigerate.
5. Pour over fresh fruit salad.
